content.problemStatement:
Given an array AAA of size NNN. Find the maximum value of the expression a‚ąób+a‚ąíba * b + a - ba‚ąób+a‚ąíb where aaa and bbb are 222 distinct elements of the array.

###Input:


First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains of two lines of input.
First line will contain NNN, number of elements of the array.
Second line contains NNN space separated integers, elements of the array AAA.
###Output:
For each testcase, output in a single line answer to the problem.

###Constraints


1‚Č§T‚Č§201 \leq T \leq 201‚Č§T‚Č§20
2‚Č§N‚Č§1052 \leq N \leq 10^52‚Č§N‚Č§105
‚ąí109‚Č§Ai‚Č§109-10^9 \leq A_i \leq 10^9‚ąí109‚Č§Ai‚Äč‚Č§109

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Case 1: Only possible pair is [2,2][2, 2][2,2] for which answer = 2‚ąó2+2‚ąí22 * 2 + 2 - 22‚ąó2+2‚ąí2 = 444.
Case 2: There are six possible pairs.
For pairs [2,3][2, 3][2,3] and [3,2][3, 2][3,2], answer = 2‚ąó3+max(2‚ąí3,3‚ąí2)2 * 3 + max(2 - 3, 3 - 2)2‚ąó3+max(2‚ąí3,3‚ąí2) = 777
For pairs [3,5][3, 5][3,5] and [5,3][5, 3][5,3] answer = 5‚ąó3+max(3‚ąí5,5‚ąí3)5 * 3 + max(3 - 5, 5 - 3)5‚ąó3+max(3‚ąí5,5‚ąí3) = 171717 and
For the pairs [2,5][2, 5][2,5] and [5,2][5, 2][5,2], answer = 2‚ąó5+max(2‚ąí5,5‚ąí2)2 * 5 + max(2 - 5, 5 - 2)2‚ąó5+max(2‚ąí5,5‚ąí2) = 131313.
So final answer is maximum of {7,17,13}\{7, 17, 13\}{7,17,13} = 171717.
